title: GCSE Exam 7: Count Integers Until Zero

questions.prompt:
An algorithm is required to count how many integers are entered by the user until they enter 0.

Write a Python program to:
  • prompt the user to enter an integer
  • repeatedly take inputs until the user enters 0
  • count how many integers are entered (not including the final 0)
  • output the count in an appropriate message
questions.explanation:
Format:
count = 0
num = int(input('Enter a number: '))
while num != 0:
    count += 1
    num = int(input('Enter a number: '))
print('Count:', count)
